info.title: Pandabase Store API
info.description: The Pandabase Store API gives merchants programmatic access to a single store: products, orders, customers, payouts, subscriptions, and usage-based billing. All endpoints are authenticated with a store token in either Bearer (`sk_`) or HMAC (`stk_`) mode.

bearerAuth.description: Bearer token authentication. Pass the secret directly in the `Authorization` header. Token secrets start with `sk_`.

hmacAuth.name: Authorization
hmacAuth.description: HMAC token authentication. Pass the token ID in the `Authorization` header as `Bearer <token_id>` (IDs start with `stk_`), and include an `X-Signature` header containing the hex-encoded HMAC-SHA256 of the JSON request body.

get.description: Returns the public configuration of the store. Requires the `STORE_READ` scope.
Returns a list of products on the store. Soft-deleted products are excluded. Requires the `PRODUCTS_READ` scope.

items.title: Pro Plan
items.subtitle: Everything you need to ship
items.description: Full access to the platform. Unlimited stores, no transaction caps.

post.description: Creates a new product on the store. Subscription products require a billing interval. Requires the `PRODUCTS_WRITE` scope.

data.title: Pro Plan
data.subtitle: Everything you need to ship
data.description: Full access to the platform. Unlimited stores, no transaction caps.

get.description: Retrieves a product by ID. Requires the `PRODUCTS_READ` scope.

data.title: Pro Plan
data.subtitle: Everything you need to ship
data.description: Full access to the platform. Unlimited stores, no transaction caps.

patch.description: Updates an existing product. Variants and options on the request are upserted by ID. Requires the `PRODUCTS_WRITE` scope.

data.title: Pro Plan
data.subtitle: Everything you need to ship
data.description: Full access to the platform. Unlimited stores, no transaction caps.

delete.description: Soft-deletes a product so it can no longer be purchased. Existing order line items remain intact for historical reference. Requires the `PRODUCTS_WRITE` scope.

get.description: Returns a list of product categories on the store. Requires the `CATEGORIES_READ` scope.

post.description: Creates a new product category. Requires the `CATEGORIES_WRITE` scope.

get.description: Retrieves a product category by ID. Requires the `CATEGORIES_READ` scope.

patch.description: Updates an existing product category. Requires the `CATEGORIES_WRITE` scope.

delete.description: Deletes a product category. Products previously assigned to the category remain on the store. Requires the `CATEGORIES_WRITE` scope.

get.description: Returns a list of coupons on the store. Requires the `COUPONS_READ` scope.

post.description: Creates a coupon that can be redeemed at checkout. Requires the `COUPONS_WRITE` scope.

get.description: Retrieves a coupon by ID. Requires the `COUPONS_READ` scope.

patch.description: Updates an existing coupon. The redemption code itself is immutable. Requires the `COUPONS_WRITE` scope.

delete.description: Deletes a coupon. Existing orders that redeemed it are unaffected. Requires the `COUPONS_WRITE` scope.

get.description: Returns a list of webhook endpoints configured on the store. Requires the `WEBHOOKS_READ` scope.

post.description: Creates a new webhook endpoint. The secret is returned only on creation and cannot be retrieved later. Requires the `WEBHOOKS_WRITE` scope.

get.description: Retrieves a webhook endpoint by ID. Requires the `WEBHOOKS_READ` scope.

patch.description: Updates an existing webhook endpoint. Requires the `WEBHOOKS_WRITE` scope.

delete.description: Deletes a webhook endpoint. Past deliveries are retained for 30 days. Requires the `WEBHOOKS_WRITE` scope.

get.description: Returns aggregate metrics for the store across orders, revenue, customers, and refunds. Requires the `ANALYTICS_READ` scope.
Returns gross transaction volume bucketed over the requested time range. Requires the `ANALYTICS_READ` scope.
Returns order counts grouped by customer country. Requires the `ANALYTICS_READ` scope.
Returns a list of payouts requested by the store, most recent first. Requires the `PAYOUTS_READ` scope.
Retrieves a payout by ID. The response includes the trace ID and expected delivery date once the payout has been dispatched. Requires the `PAYOUTS_READ` scope.
Returns the bank accounts configured for the store's payouts. Requires the `PAYOUTS_READ` scope.
Returns the store's balance ledger, an immutable record of every balance mutation. Requires the `PAYOUTS_READ` scope.
Returns a list of orders placed on the store, most recent first. Requires the `ORDERS_READ` scope.
Retrieves an order by ID. Requires the `ORDERS_READ` scope.
Returns the refunds issued against the specified order. Requires the `ORDERS_READ` scope.

post.description: Re-runs fulfillment for an order whose initial fulfillment attempt failed. Requires the `ORDERS_WRITE` scope.

get.description: Returns a list of payments collected on the store, most recent first. Requires the `ORDERS_READ` scope.
Retrieves a payment by ID. Requires the `ORDERS_READ` scope.
Returns a list of customers who have checked out on the store, most recent first. Requires the `CUSTOMERS_READ` scope.
Retrieves a customer by ID. Requires the `CUSTOMERS_READ` scope.
Returns a list of license keys issued by the store. Requires the `LICENSES_READ` scope.
Retrieves a license by ID. The response includes the decrypted key. Requires the `LICENSES_READ` scope.

post.description: Verifies a license key against a product and returns its activation status. Intended for first-party software activation flows. Requires the `LICENSES_READ` scope.

get.description: Returns a list of subscriptions on the store, most recent first. Requires the `SUBSCRIPTIONS_READ` scope.
Retrieves a subscription by ID. Requires the `SUBSCRIPTIONS_READ` scope.

Returns a live projection of the current billing period together with summaries of past periods for the subscription. Non-usage subscriptions return `isUsageBased: false`. Requires the `USAGE_READ` scope.

post.description: Cancels a subscription, either at once or at the end of the current billing period depending on the `cancelAt` value. Requires the `SUBSCRIPTIONS_WRITE` scope.

get.description: Returns a list of support cases on the store, most recent first. Requires the `CASES_READ` scope.
Retrieves a support case by ID. Requires the `CASES_READ` scope.

patch.description: Updates a support case, typically to change its status. Requires the `CASES_WRITE` scope.

get.description: Returns the messages on a support case in chronological order. Requires the `CASES_READ` scope.

items.body: Hi, the key I got for my order doesn't activate. Can you help?

post.description: Posts a reply to a support case. The customer is notified by email. Requires the `CASES_WRITE` scope.

data.body: Thanks for reaching out. Looking into this now.

post.description: Marks all unread customer messages on a case as read. Requires the `CASES_WRITE` scope.

get.description: Returns a list of refunds issued on the store, most recent first. Requires the `REFUNDS_READ` scope.
Retrieves a refund by ID. Requires the `REFUNDS_READ` scope.

post.description: Issues a refund against an order. The order must be completed, have no open dispute, and fall within the 30-day refund window. Requires the `REFUNDS_WRITE` scope.

get.description: Returns a list of disputes filed against the store's payments. Requires the `DISPUTES_READ` scope.
Retrieves a dispute by ID. Requires the `DISPUTES_READ` scope.

post.description: Submits evidence for a dispute to be reviewed by the card network. Customer-side fields are auto-filled from the original transaction. Requires the `DISPUTES_WRITE` scope.

Reports usage events against a subscription's meters. Up to 100 events may be reported per call. Duplicate events keyed by `meter_id` and `external_id` are silently skipped. Requires the `USAGE_WRITE` scope.

get.description: Returns a list of usage events for a subscription, most recent first. Can be filtered by `meter_id` and by an `event_at` range. Requires the `USAGE_READ` scope.
Returns the list of usage meters configured on a product. Requires the `METERS_READ` scope.

post.description: Creates a usage meter on a product. The product must be a subscription with `pricing_model` set to `USAGE_BASED`. A product can have up to 10 meters. Requires the `METERS_WRITE` scope.

eventName.description: Name reported on POST /v2/core/.../usage; unique per product.

unitPrice.description: Cents per unitQuantity units. Zero allowed for free meters.

unitQuantity.description: Denominator for unitPrice. E.g. 1_000_000 for '$3 / 1M tokens'.

includedUnits.description: Units included in base fee before metering kicks in. Only for BASE_PLUS_OVERAGE.

get.description: Retrieves a usage meter by ID. Requires the `METERS_READ` scope.

patch.description: Updates a usage meter. The `eventName`, `aggregation`, and `settlement` fields become immutable once any usage event has been reported against the meter. Rate fields remain editable. Requires the `METERS_WRITE` scope.

delete.description: Deletes a usage meter. Returns a `409` if any usage event or billed period summary references the meter, since audit history is preserved indefinitely. Requires the `METERS_WRITE` scope.

post.description: Queues an asynchronous report. The response returns immediately with `status: PENDING`; poll `GET /reports/:reportId` or wait for the merchant email. Periods cannot exceed 90 days. Requires the `REPORTS_WRITE` scope.

get.description: Returns the store's reports, most recent first. Filter by `status` or `type`. Requires the `REPORTS_READ` scope.
Retrieves a report by ID. Status transitions: `PENDING → PROCESSING → SUCCEEDED | FAILED`. Requires the `REPORTS_READ` scope.
Returns a 5-minute pre-signed S3 URL for the generated report file. Fetch a fresh URL when the previous one expires. Requires the `REPORTS_READ` scope.
